name: Ninju Mukimuki Nezumi
alt_names: 忍にん獣ムキムキねずみ
description: Intelligent mice that work for Tengen Uzui. The mice are specially trained for the purpose of being assistants to Tengen and his acquaintances, as seen during the events at Yoshiwara, Tokyo. They are strong enough to carry one sword per mouse, and are capable of navigating small spaces humans normally wouldn't be able to.
